Package com.saperion.ws.wrapper

Class SaWsRevision

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.ws.wrapper.SaWsRevision
public class SaWsRevision extends Object
This class wraps the SaRevision class.
Author:
Daniel Manzke

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SaWsRevision()
    Creates a new instance of SaJNIVersionDataWrapper.
    SaWsRevision(com.saperion.intf.SaRevision result)
    Creates a new instance of SaJNIVersionDataWrapper and wraps the original.

  • Constructor Details

    • SaWsRevision

      public SaWsRevision()
      Creates a new instance of SaJNIVersionDataWrapper.

    • SaWsRevision

      public SaWsRevision(com.saperion.intf.SaRevision result)
      Creates a new instance of SaJNIVersionDataWrapper and wraps the original.
      Parameters:
      result - Result which holds the information of the backend and which will be extracted to this bean

  • Method Details

    • getRevisionUid

      public String getRevisionUid()
      Reads the revision ID.
      Returns:
      revisionUid

    • setRevisionUid

      public void setRevisionUid(String revisionUID)
      Sets the revision ID.
      Parameters:
      revisionUID - unique ID of a revision

    • getRevisionUser

      public String getRevisionUser()
      Reads the revision user.
      Returns:
      revisionUser

    • setRevisionUser

      public void setRevisionUser(String revUser)
      Sets revision user.
      Parameters:
      revUser - Name of the user which created the revision

    • getRevisionComment

      public String getRevisionComment()
      Reads revision comment.
      Returns:
      versionComment

    • setRevisionComment

      public void setRevisionComment(String revComment)
      Sets revision comment.
      Parameters:
      revComment - Comment which was sets while creating a revision

    • getRevisionNumber

      public String getRevisionNumber()
      Reads revision number.
      Returns:
      versionNumber

    • setRevisionNumber

      public void setRevisionNumber(String revNumber)
      Sets revision number.
      Parameters:
      revNumber - Number of revisions

    • getRevisionDate

      public Date getRevisionDate()
      Reads revision date.
      Returns:
      revisionDate

    • setRevisionDate

      public void setRevisionDate(Date revDate)
      Sets revision date.
      Parameters:
      revDate - Date when the revision was created
